props.name: ariaLabel
props.description:
Adds an `aria-label` to the token.

Use this if the label is not plain text.

props.name: description
props.description: Further information about the token that appears below the label.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Determines whether the token is disabled.

props.name: dismissLabel
props.description: Adds an `aria-label` to the dismiss button.

props.name: labelTag
props.description: A label tag that provides additional guidance, shown next to the label.

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Specifies if the control is read-only. A read-only control is still focusable.

props.name: tags
props.description: A list of tags giving further guidance about the token.

props.name: tooltipContent
props.description:
Content to display in the tooltip when `variant="inline"`. The tooltip appears when the token label is truncated due to insufficient space.

Only applies to plain text labels.

props.name: variant
props.description:
Specifies the token's visual style and functionality.

For `inline` only label, icon and dismiss button are displayed.

Defaults to `normal` if not specified.
